title: Piglin Quartz Tower
description: Adds a Piglin guarded quartz tower to the Nether, decorated inside and filled with loot
body:
This mod adds a Piglin-guarded quartz tower to the Nether.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8f51b6cb6c4e6dbcab2c73af6fe919da9cd1275.jpeg)

- Inside, you'll find piglins that protect the loot.
- The structure consists of a base layer and an upper floor, featuring more decorations, additional loot and brutes protecting this tower.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/032383c00959570a211809cb76552298d2545645.jpeg)

- The loot is similar to what you’d find in Piglin Bastions.
- At the top of the tower, burning soul fire and rising smoke make it easy visible from afar.

![top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/563c2cb4508e48bb47fe0a4bb81d4afc3e5ad954.jpeg)




Feel free to put it in your modpack!
